calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Grabstein for and with Susanne Low. Norman Lew for and with Connie Yamamoto and Edwin Low.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the accounting, expenses for the building, the rental income, the administation fees/commissions, the Attorney's fees, the bank accounts, the percentage interests, the sale of the property, the costs of discovery, the assets being part of the Estate or not, distribution of the Estate, the possibilty of a partition action, etc. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Continued To Jun-18-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Grabstein for and with Susanne Low. Norman Lew for and with Edwin Low and with Connie Low Yamamoto.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the accounting, expenses for the building, the rental income, the administation fees, the Attorney's fees, the bank accounts, the percentage interests, the sale of the property, the costs of subpeonaed records, the assets being part of the Estate or not, etc. The Parties also spoke of the Father's life estate and the Decree of Distribution of the Estate of Foo Ting Low case number 249306. The matter was continued to June 18, 2010 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Lew is to file a supplement to the petition explaining/itemizing the rents and expenses to see if there is any residue by May 14, 2010. The Court encouraged the Family to bring this matter to a conclusion and to try mediation again.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Miramontes.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-02-2010 Continued To Apr-16-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Continued To Apr-09-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Grabstein for and with Suzanne Low. Norman Lew for Connie Yamamoto and Edwin Low.

Mr. Grabstein stated that he did not want to file a reply, that the petition was not verified and that it raised factual issues. The matter was continued to April 9, 2010 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a hearing on the accounting. A reply by Mr. Grabstein is due by March 9, 2010. The response by Mr. Lew is due by March 23, 2010.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Continued To Feb-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Grabstein for and with Susan Low. Norman Lew for and the Executor's.

The Parties reported that discussions regarding settlement had taken place but that a settlement had not been reached. The Court stated that Mr. Lew needed to file responses to the objections and to the issues raised in the Examiner's notes. The matter was continued to February 23, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Continued To Dec-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Norman Lew for Connie Low Yamamoto and Edwin Low. Richard Grabstein for and with Susanne Low.

Mr. Low stated that mediation was held, that some issues were resolved, that a few issues remain, and that they are requesting a continuance for additional time to attempt to resolve the remaining issues. In addition, Mr. Lew stated that the the third daughter was present at the mediation. Mr. Grabstein requested a one month continuance and stated that if there was no resolution then a hearing date should be set. The matter was continued to December 15, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Continued To Nov-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Norman Lew for Connie Yamamoto. Richard Grabstein for and with Suzanne Low.

The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 27, 2009. A status hearing on mediation was set for November 3, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez and Deputy A. Kendall.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2009 Continued To Aug-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Granted Per Written Order
